title: Direction on the rent standard
body: "The Direction on the rent standard 2019 required the regulator of social housing to set a rent standard for registered providers of social housing with effect from 1 April 2020. The Direction on the rent standard 2023 now requires the regulator of social housing to set a rent standard for registered providers of social housing with effect from 1 April 2023.  The Direction on the rent standard 2023 will operate alongside the Direction on the rent standard 2019.  They are accompanied by a new policy statement which sets out the government’s policy on rents for social housing from 1 April 2023 onwards. This replaces the policy statement on rents that was issued in February 2019. "
